description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric design with large windows and a mix of white and light wood exterior finishes. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes landscaped green areas with trees and shrubs, as well as paved walkways and a driveway. The main structure is two stories tall, with the upper floor set back, creating a stepped profile. The rear of the house opens onto a private garden, while the front is accessible via a wide paved path. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, maximizing natural light. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on open, functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white and wood finishes, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped gardens.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long wooden fence, green lawn, and a paved driveway with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, large windows, and paved walkway leading up to the house.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a spacious backyard, wooden fencing, and a visible glass-roofed section.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and a continuation of the paved area and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
